Package org.firstinspires.ftc.teamcode.util

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    LimelightCalibrator.Telemetry
    Telemetry interface for compatibility.
    LimelightCalibrator.Telemetry.Log  
  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    CurrentLimiter
    Current limiter that scales motor power based on measured current draw.
    DataLogger
    CSV-based telemetry logging utility for recording robot data to disk.
    FeedforwardTuner
    Simple feedforward tuning utility for swerve drive.
    LimelightCalibrator
    Utility for calibrating Limelight3A camera position and orientation.
    LimelightCalibrator.CalibrationResult
    Result of a calibration operation.
    LimelightCamera
    Advanced wrapper class for a Limelight3A camera with calibration, health monitoring, and multi-camera fusion support.
    OctoQuadFWv3
    Driver for OctoQuad Firmware v3 - required for OctoQuad FTC Edition MK2.
    OctoQuadFWv3.ChannelPulseWidthParams
    Pulse width parameters for absolute encoders.
    OctoQuadFWv3.EncoderDataBlock
    A data block holding all encoder data; this block may be bulk read in one I2C operation.
    OctoQuadFWv3.FirmwareVersion
    Firmware version information.
    OctoQuadFWv3.LocalizerDataBlock
    A data block holding all localizer data with CRC validation.
    PinpointHealthMonitor
    Health monitor for detecting odometry sensor drift.
    SensorFusionLocalizer
    Extended Kalman Filter (EKF) for fusing multiple localization sources.
    SlewRateLimiter
    Rate limiter for smoothing control signals to prevent current spikes.
    SteeringTuner
    Automatic tuning utility for swerve drive steering (axial) control.
    SwerveOdometry
    Odometry tracker for swerve drive using drive wheel encoders.
  • Enum Summary 
    Enum Description
    OctoQuadFWv3.ChannelBankConfig
    Channel bank configuration for quadrature vs pulse width mode.
    OctoQuadFWv3.EncoderDirection
    Encoder direction setting for reversing channels internally.
    OctoQuadFWv3.I2cRecoveryMode  
    OctoQuadFWv3.LocalizerStatus
    Status of the absolute localizer algorithm.
    OctoQuadFWv3.Register  
    OctoQuadFWv3.RegisterType  
  • Exception Summary 
    Exception Description
    OctoQuadFWv3.OctoQuadException
    Exception thrown when OctoQuad encounters an error condition.
